title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Dome - UniFi Video Camera G5 Dome
description: The UniFi Protect G5 Dome camera has a 5MP sensor (2688 x 1512px) at 24fps, a fixed lens (approx. 2.8mm), IR illumination to 10m for night vision, microphone and speaker. The camera has a very robust metal body, IK08 resistance against vandals and IPX4 against weather and splash water. It connects to the network using a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet port that supports power over a cable - 802.3af PoE (37 - 57V DC) 5MP, 30 FPS Video Night mode with IR LEDs up to 10m Wide shot, viewing angle 102.4 ° IPX4 weatherproof cover Built-in microphone and speaker Power supply via PoE, max. consumption 5W Enhanced colors with HDR (High Dynamic Range) Managed by UniFi Protect software - from version 2.2.7, 2.7.18 (web) or 1.10.0 (mobile app) Resistance to vandals - IK08 Note: UniFI Protect is required to run this product with full functionality, we recommend using it with UniFi Dream Machine Pro or UniFi Protect Network Video Recorder Device Screws + dowels Plastic sheet for attaching to the wall
specsSearch: Camera Lens type Fixed Lens [mm] 2,8 (fixed) Illumination IR Illumination range [m] 10 Viewing Angle [°] 102 Day/night mode IR cut filter Image Resolution 5MP Max. resolution [pixels] 2688 x 1512 Connectors and Interfaces Audio Microphone, Speaker LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 37 .. 57V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 5 Physical characteristics Protection class IPX4 Purpose Outdoor Antivandal (Impact protection) IK8 Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 40 Weight [g] 370 Width [mm] 109 Height [mm] 65 Depth [mm] 109 Color White Compression standard Video compression H.264 General Camera class UniFi Protect
